description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a slightly bulging cylindrical shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves bound together by several evenly spaced dark metal hoops. The wood appears to be medium brown with visible grain, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The metal hoops are dark gray or black, providing structural reinforcement and a visual contrast to the wood. The top and bottom surfaces are flat, and there is no visible lid or opening mechanism. The barrel is hollow inside, as is typical for such containers, and is designed to store or transport liquids or dry goods. There are no visible handles, markings, or labels on the exterior.
description: A medium-sized, bulging wooden barrel reinforced with dark metal hoops and no visible lid or handles. The wood is medium brown with a rustic finish.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full barrel with its wooden staves and metal hoops clearly visible, centered against a plain background.
description_view_1: This view is from behind the barrel, showing only the plain background and no part of the barrel itself.
description_view_2: This side view also shows only the plain background, with the barrel not visible.
description_view_3: The rear view of the barrel, similar to the front, displays the wooden staves and metal hoops, but from the opposite side.
